languages.text: "Я дам вам небольшую фору, прежде чем пустить по следу убийц — в отместку за все".
"I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."
languages.original_text: "Я дам вам небольшую фору, прежде чем пустить по следу убийц — в отместку за все".

traits.locale_text: "I am going to give you a slight head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."
"I am going to give you a slight head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."
"I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."
"I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."
"I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."

languages.text: "Ich gebe Euch einen kleinen Vorsprung, bevor ich meine Assassinen auf Euch hetze ... als Dank für alles, was Ihr getan habt."
languages.original_text: "I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gebe Euch einen kleinen Vorsprung, bevor ich meine Assassinen auf Euch hetze ... als Dank für alles, was Ihr getan habt."

languages.text: « Je vais vous laisser une longueur d'avance avant de lâcher des assassins à vos trousses ; vous paierez pour vos actes. »
languages.original_text: "I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais vous laisser une longueur d'avance avant de lâcher des assassins à vos trousses ; vous paierez pour vos actes. »

languages.text: «Le daré una pequeña ventaja antes de enviar asesinos contra usted; como agradecimiento por todo lo que ha hecho».
languages.original_text: "I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."

traits.locale_text: «Le daré una pequeña ventaja antes de enviar asesinos contra usted; como agradecimiento por todo lo que ha hecho».

languages.text: "Tüm yaptıklarının bedeli olarak... Peşine suikastçılar göndermeden önce sana kısa bir avans vereceğim."
languages.original_text: "I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."

traits.locale_text: "Tüm yaptıklarının bedeli olarak... Peşine suikastçılar göndermeden önce sana kısa bir avans vereceğim."

languages.text: “在我派刺客去追杀你之前，你可以先跑一会儿，算是对你所作所为的回敬。”
languages.original_text: "I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."

traits.locale_text: “在我派刺客去追杀你之前，你可以先跑一会儿，算是对你所作所为的回敬。”

languages.text: 「お前がやったことへの報いとして、暗殺者を追いかける前に、少しだけ先に行かせてやる」
languages.original_text: "I am going to give you a short head start before sending assassins after you — as payback for all you have done."

traits.locale_text: 「お前がやったことへの報いとして、暗殺者を追いかける前に、少しだけ先に行かせてやる」
